patch.value: pm init --type-preset agile|ops|research: batch-register domain item types
A fresh init registers no custom types; each domain (agile: Story/Spike; ops: Incident/Runbook; research: Experiment/Hypothesis) requires manual add-type calls.
pm init --type-preset <preset> idempotently registers the preset's types; composes with --preset/--defaults; InitResult.registered_type_preset; docs+tests; no-preset behavior unchanged.
A fresh init registers no custom types; each domain (agile: Story/Spike; ops: Incident/Runbook; research: Experiment/Hypothesis) requires manual add-type calls.
